title: WebM to MOV (Preserve Alpha)
upload_title: Click or drag WebM video file here
upload_hint: Supports WebM (VP8/VP9) video with alpha channel
transparency_info: This tool preserves all transparent pixels at pixel level. The generated MOV file can be used in Final Cut Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve and other professional software.
alert_webm_only: Please upload a WebM video file
